author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

Starbased Release Date

The Galia Expanse calls, urging you to collaboratively forge and maintain your faction's infrastructure.    

Join your faction for Starbased, an update to SAGE Labs introducing starbase upgrading and upkeeping. As you upgrade your starbases, unlock new crafting recipes to help compete for influence.  Earn Loyalty Points for your contributions and use it to gain ATLAS at the end of an Epoch.

Coming April 2.

Important:
Economy mechanics in the current game ID will be active until April 16 to ease the transition to the Starbased game ID (The current game ID will still be live after the 16th, with economic variables turned to ZERO),The new subdomain for Starbased will be based.staratlas.com,On Starbased launch, Faction Fleet will receive a 50% reduction in ATLAS emissions (66.67% reduction from inception),The SDU mechanics mentioned during our last Town Hall won't take effect until the deprecation of the current game ID on April 16,On Starbased launch, Armstrong ships will no longer be supported in Faction Claims,
 | Learn more about what's coming in Starbased: https://medium.com/star-atlas/announcing-starbased-a-new-chapter-in-the-star-atlas-sage-saga-5dc3b9abe44d
